title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 173.007 - Commissioner of education, appointment by board — compensation — powers — duties
text:
173.007.  Commissioner of education, appointment by board — compensation — powers — duties. — The coordinating board for higher education shall appoint, and shall fix the powers, duties, and compensation within the limits of appropriations made for that purpose of, a commissioner of higher education, who shall be the chief administrative officer of the coordinating board.
(L. 1983 S.B. 113 § 173.085)
